isDomainVerified.description: Indicates whether the domain owning this DNS record has been verified by the WAF provider.

isProxied.description: Indicates whether traffic for this DNS record is proxied through the WAF provider's network (for example, using a CDN or reverse proxy).

name.description: The DNS record name (for example, www.contoso.com or contoso.com). This is the host or zone name to which the configuration applies.

value.description: The value of the DNS record.
